rulings.Case Title: IN RE: BELVA WATSON, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent B. Watson'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Petition To Recover Real And Personal Property Belonging To Decedent And Etc.
rulings.Rulings: The Court continues this hearing to April 9, 2014, at 2:00 p.m. Dorothy Lucille White is ordered to file her opposition briefs to the pending motions no later than April 2, 2014. Alternatively, she must move for a continuance with a showing of good cause. Should Ms. White fail to file any opposition brief or to move for a continuance, counsel for Belva Watson should submit two separate proposed orders (one for the demurrer and one for the motion for sanctions) and a further tentative ruling will issue on April 8, 2014.
